case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. YOSHITSUG NAKAMURA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033B(1)&(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAKAMURA, YOSHITSUG $3,797.63 PRINCIPAL, $1,408.76 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,442.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED JUN-06-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAMURA, YOSHITSUG
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAMURA, YOSHITSUG
AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED JUN-06-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAMURA, YOSHITSUG
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAMURA, YOSHITSUG
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NAKAMURA, YOSHITSUG DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-17-2008
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTYS'. FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF DONDREA ROBINSON RE: CCP 585(D) - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
